title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Medical Officer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
